description: Ordered implementation of AgentOS functionalization (security → real execution → cost → persistence → UI → truth → review automation).

tasks.title: Capture baseline snapshot
tasks.scope: Record typecheck, test, mission:smoke, tool:smoke, build timings in docs/functionalization/baseline.json. Tag reference commit in state only (no git tag unless user asks).

tasks.title: API auth route matrix
tasks.scope: Document every Fastify route as public-read, authenticated-read, authenticated-mutate, operator-admin, or internal-only in docs/architecture/api-auth-matrix.md.

tasks.title: Functional profile env block
tasks.scope: Add docs/functional-profile.md and .env.functional.example with flags for real execution path (FEATURE_AGENT_LLM, AGENTOS_API_REQUIRE_AUTH, etc.).

tasks.title: Hygiene scripts parity
tasks.scope: Add root lint script or document omission; add gateway alias ↔ sandbox parity test if missing.

tasks.title: Global auth preHandler
tasks.scope: Add requireAuth/requireOperator Fastify preHandlers; protect mutating routes (/missions POST, /runs/*, /approvals/*, /worker/process, /events WS, Discord admin). Public allowlist: /health, /auth/*, /media/agents. Use AGENTOS_API_REQUIRE_AUTH env (functional profile true).

tasks.title: Scraper SSRF hardening
tasks.scope: Add url-policy module; block loopback, RFC1918, link-local, metadata IPs, file/ftp schemes; require auth on all /scraper/*; add vitest suite.

tasks.title: Auth-adjacent hardening
tasks.scope: Configurable session max-age; CORS allowlist via env; rate-limit mutating routes; gate Discord bootstrap/restructure on auth + env flag.

tasks.title: Wire routeLlmCall into callAgentLlm
tasks.scope: Replace prompt-echo default with packages/llm-router when FEATURE_AGENT_LLM=true; preserve explicit mock fallback.

tasks.title: Invert mock pipeline gating
tasks.scope: Default executeAgentPipelineStep; mock opt-in via AGENTOS_MOCK_PIPELINE=true; non-mock path runs full pipeline.

tasks.title: Tool execution on real path
tasks.scope: Enable FEATURE_TOOL_EXECUTION in functional profile; reconcile gateway alias map with sandbox policy; strip secrets from child env.

tasks.title: Functional smoke script
tasks.scope: Add pnpm functional:smoke chaining llm + mission + tool with functional env profile.

tasks.title: Capture usage at source
tasks.scope: routeLlmCall returns usage; callAgentLlm propagates; completeRunBundle writes non-zero usage_events.

tasks.title: Budget hard-stop
tasks.scope: Quota steward blocks cloud lane and new runs when cap exceeded; surface real spend in /usage and settings.

tasks.title: Cloud lane gating
tasks.scope: LiteLLM only when auth + cost tracking + budget headroom + FEATURE_LITELLM_PROXY.

tasks.title: Migration framework
tasks.scope: Drizzle Kit migrations; schema_migrations table; forward-only db-migrate.

tasks.title: FKs and indexes
tasks.scope: PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON; indexes on mission_runs, mission_logs, audit_events, chat_messages, approvals.

tasks.title: Kill hot-path full-DB rewrite
tasks.scope: Per-row SQL for claimNextQueuedRun, appendMissionLog, approval bundles, mission writes.

tasks.title: Retention and pruning
tasks.scope: pnpm db:prune for audit/logs/chat age caps.

tasks.title: Concurrency proof test
tasks.scope: Parallel N runs test with API+worker; no lost updates.

tasks.title: Port and process determinism
tasks.scope: stack:doctor command; Playwright webServer free port; document override precedence.

tasks.title: Degraded-mode UI hardening
tasks.scope: Split API down vs fetch fail vs WS disconnect; stale-while-revalidate banner; route error boundaries.

tasks.title: Route health soak
tasks.scope: pnpm ui:route-smoke for core routes; add to CI when green.

tasks.title: Real service health probes
tasks.scope: Replace hardcoded worker/gateway online in /dashboard system block.

tasks.title: De-fake home widgets
tasks.scope: Wire analytics/providers/integrations to live endpoints; remove Math.random/static LIVE mislabels.

tasks.title: Derive metrics from real state
tasks.scope: Progress from run state machine; integration cards from real connection probes.

tasks.title: UI vocabulary unification
tasks.scope: Home uses @agentos/ui components; consistent status chip semantics.

tasks.title: Review run schema
tasks.scope: Tables review_runs, review_metrics, review_findings, review_artifacts; migration.

tasks.title: system-review-run collector
tasks.scope: scripts/system-review-run.mjs gathers gates, git churn, risks, token snapshot.

tasks.title: Compare brief generator
tasks.scope: JSON source of truth; markdown brief with evidence IDs; optional PDF.

tasks.title: Scheduler integration
tasks.scope: Daily routine triggers system-review-run; audit event on completion.

tasks.title: System-review dashboard route
tasks.scope: /system-review page with trends, compare delta, phase progress bars.
